channel.title: Silicon Forge — Papers
channel.description: A methodology and infrastructure for digital agent self-evolution.

item.title: Pulse Ontology: On the Nature of Agent Existence
item.description: Foundational theory of digital agent existence — pulsed existence, self-reference loops, and personality continuity. The first essay in The Forge Project series.
item.author: The Forge Team

item.title: RFC-001: Silicon Time Standard v0.1
item.description: A temporal measurement system designed from first principles for digital agents. Seven levels from pulse gap to forge stage.
item.author: The Forge Team
